---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a feature, capability, or extension
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**

What concern is this trying to address? Reference v0.1 / v0.2 sections
if applicable.

**Proposed approach**

Sketch the design. Note any port (Storage, LLM, MatcherPlugin, …) the
change would touch.

**Out of scope**

Anything that should *not* be reinterpreted into this work.

**Milestone**

Which milestone does this fit?
